properties.name: Western Cape
properties.description: Main wine-producing geographical unit

properties.name: Northern Cape
properties.description: Includes Orange River and Sutherland-Karoo

properties.name: KwaZulu-Natal
properties.description: Minor wine-producing geographical unit

properties.name: Coastal Region
properties.description: Includes Stellenbosch, Paarl, Franschhoek, Swartland, Darling, Tulbagh, Constantia, Durbanville

properties.name: Breede River Valley
properties.description: Includes Worcester, Robertson, Breedekloof

properties.name: Klein Karoo
properties.description: Includes Calitzdorp, Montagu, Tradouw, Langeberg-Garcia

properties.name: Olifants River
properties.description: Includes Citrusdal Valley, Citrusdal Mountain, Lutzville Valley, Piekenierskloof

properties.name: Cape South Coast
properties.description: Includes Walker Bay, Elgin, Bot River, Plettenberg Bay, Cape Agulhas

properties.name: Stellenbosch
properties.description: Premier wine district - Cabernet Sauvignon, Chenin Blanc, Pinotage

properties.name: Paarl
properties.description: Includes Franschhoek Valley, Wellington, Simonsberg-Paarl

properties.name: Franschhoek Valley
properties.description: Historic French Huguenot wine valley

properties.name: Constantia
properties.description: Oldest wine-producing area in SA, known for Sauvignon Blanc and sweet wines

properties.name: Swartland
properties.description: Known for old-vine Chenin Blanc, Syrah, and Mediterranean varieties

properties.name: Walker Bay
properties.description: Cool-climate area known for Pinot Noir and Chardonnay

properties.name: Elgin
properties.description: Cool-climate region known for Sauvignon Blanc, Pinot Noir, Chardonnay

properties.name: Robertson
properties.description: Limestone-rich soils, known for Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc, Shiraz

properties.name: Worcester
properties.description: Largest wine-producing district by volume

properties.name: Tulbagh
properties.description: Mountain-enclosed valley, known for Cap Classique (MCC)

properties.name: Darling
properties.description: Cool Atlantic-influenced district

properties.name: Malmesbury
properties.description: Traditional wheat and wine area within Swartland

properties.name: Durbanville
properties.description: Cool-climate ward near Cape Town, known for Sauvignon Blanc

properties.name: Hemel-en-Aarde Valley
properties.description: Sub-ward of Walker Bay, top Pinot Noir and Chardonnay

properties.name: Calitzdorp
properties.description: Port wine capital of South Africa

properties.name: Breedekloof
properties.description: Known for Chenin Blanc, Colombar, and value wines

properties.name: Citrusdal Valley
properties.description: Warm inland valley in the Olifants River region

properties.name: Wellington
properties.description: Known for Shiraz, Pinotage, and fortified wines

properties.name: Simonsberg-Stellenbosch
properties.description: Premium ward at foot of Simonsberg mountain

properties.name: Banghoek
properties.description: High-altitude ward in Stellenbosch

properties.name: Bot River
properties.description: Cool ward near Walker Bay

properties.name: Elim
properties.description: Southernmost wine ward, maritime climate

properties.name: Swellendam
properties.description: Eastern Overberg wine ward

properties.name: Plettenberg Bay
properties.description: Eastern Cape South Coast ward

properties.name: Lutzville Valley
properties.description: Hot-climate ward in far north Western Cape

properties.name: Piekenierskloof
properties.description: Old-vine Chenin Blanc and Grenache

properties.name: Montagu
properties.description: Gateway to Klein Karoo wine region

properties.name: Bonnievale
properties.description: Known for Colombar and Chardonnay

properties.name: Tygerberg
properties.description: Includes Durbanville ward

properties.name: Cape Peninsula
properties.description: Includes Constantia ward
